## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Yourco and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and upcoming product launches.](https://fathom.video/share/-M1ps5xWKXq9CpNgFouwS-xxj7RsNA-A?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Google indexing issues are improving, with crawled-not-indexed pages down from 300 to 96](https://fathom.video/share/-M1ps5xWKXq9CpNgFouwS-xxj7RsNA-A?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [Employee survey content will be a focus for the next few weeks, ahead of a new product feature launch](https://fathom.video/share/-M1ps5xWKXq9CpNgFouwS-xxj7RsNA-A?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
  - [Exploring options for creating interactive survey template content, balancing current capabilities with potential future enhancements](https://fathom.video/share/-M1ps5xWKXq9CpNgFouwS-xxj7RsNA-A?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)
  - [Considering experimenting with a standalone site (yourco.io/something) for new content initiatives before committing engineering resources](https://fathom.video/share/-M1ps5xWKXq9CpNgFouwS-xxj7RsNA-A?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)

## Topics

### Google Search Console and Indexing Issues

  - [214 pages pending, 104 failed in Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/-M1ps5xWKXq9CpNgFouwS-xxj7RsNA-A?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [Crawled-not-indexed pages reduced from \~300 to 96 after mobile fix implementation](https://fathom.video/share/-M1ps5xWKXq9CpNgFouwS-xxj7RsNA-A?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [Manual resubmission of top articles as a test showed positive results](https://fathom.video/share/-M1ps5xWKXq9CpNgFouwS-xxj7RsNA-A?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
  - [Team to investigate remaining failed indexing attempts](https://fathom.video/share/-M1ps5xWKXq9CpNgFouwS-xxj7RsNA-A?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Content Performance Analysis

  - [New Looker dashboard provides more in-depth cohort analysis](https://fathom.video/share/-M1ps5xWKXq9CpNgFouwS-xxj7RsNA-A?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
  - [Top-performing clusters: translations and texting vs. email](https://fathom.video/share/-M1ps5xWKXq9CpNgFouwS-xxj7RsNA-A?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [Incident communication content shows better click-through rates despite fewer impressions](https://fathom.video/share/-M1ps5xWKXq9CpNgFouwS-xxj7RsNA-A?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
  - [Tactical, actionable content generally performs better](https://fathom.video/share/-M1ps5xWKXq9CpNgFouwS-xxj7RsNA-A?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)

### Employee Survey Content Strategy

  - [Focus on employee survey content for the next few weeks](https://fathom.video/share/-M1ps5xWKXq9CpNgFouwS-xxj7RsNA-A?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
  - [New built-in employee survey feature launching in \~2 months](https://fathom.video/share/-M1ps5xWKXq9CpNgFouwS-xxj7RsNA-A?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)
  - [Plan to create survey templates as content, potentially integrating with the product later](https://fathom.video/share/-M1ps5xWKXq9CpNgFouwS-xxj7RsNA-A?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
  - [Exploring options for interactive HTML pages vs. static blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/-M1ps5xWKXq9CpNgFouwS-xxj7RsNA-A?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)

### Content Distribution and Brand Building

  - [Discussing long-term strategy for building Yourco's brand in the HR community](https://fathom.video/share/-M1ps5xWKXq9CpNgFouwS-xxj7RsNA-A?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)
  - [Exploring community engagement on platforms like Reddit](https://fathom.video/share/-M1ps5xWKXq9CpNgFouwS-xxj7RsNA-A?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)
  - [Considering resource-first approach to brand building](https://fathom.video/share/-M1ps5xWKXq9CpNgFouwS-xxj7RsNA-A?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)

### Workflow and Schedule Adjustments

  - [July 4th holiday impact on content review schedule](https://fathom.video/share/-M1ps5xWKXq9CpNgFouwS-xxj7RsNA-A?tab=summary&timestamp=1482.0)
  - [Request to return to one-week buffer for content updates to smooth out the process](https://fathom.video/share/-M1ps5xWKXq9CpNgFouwS-xxj7RsNA-A?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)
  - [Team to work on implementing the buffer](https://fathom.video/share/-M1ps5xWKXq9CpNgFouwS-xxj7RsNA-A?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)

### Artifacts and Persona Updates

  - [Audience personas need updating to align with high-priority targets](https://fathom.video/share/-M1ps5xWKXq9CpNgFouwS-xxj7RsNA-A?tab=summary&timestamp=1604.0)
  - [Darrell to work on creating more comprehensive persona descriptions](https://fathom.video/share/-M1ps5xWKXq9CpNgFouwS-xxj7RsNA-A?tab=summary&timestamp=1619.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sync with technical SEO team on indexing issues and share findings](https://fathom.video/share/-M1ps5xWKXq9CpNgFouwS-xxj7RsNA-A?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)
  - [Focus on creating employee survey content and templates](https://fathom.video/share/-M1ps5xWKXq9CpNgFouwS-xxj7RsNA-A?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
  - [Explore options for interactive survey template presentation](https://fathom.video/share/-M1ps5xWKXq9CpNgFouwS-xxj7RsNA-A?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)
  - [Consider experimenting with a standalone site for new content initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/-M1ps5xWKXq9CpNgFouwS-xxj7RsNA-A?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)
  - [Implement one-week buffer for content updates](https://fathom.video/share/-M1ps5xWKXq9CpNgFouwS-xxj7RsNA-A?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)
  - [Update and expand audience personas](https://fathom.video/share/-M1ps5xWKXq9CpNgFouwS-xxj7RsNA-A?tab=summary&timestamp=1604.0)
